title: My First Crux
description:
Every empire begins with dirt. In your case, highly engineered dirt.

Iron Cruxes are the foundation of automated resource growth and can be used as soil inside Botany Pots. Craft one and begin cultivating materials instead of scavenging for them.

This modpack uses a custom Crux system. Each Crux tier unlocks new crops and resources, and they are not interchangeable.
